city_thesis: Durham should start as one subscale exact-site hosted review motion around a single empty or pre-tenant logistics bay with pre-dispatch export-control screening and no buyer-lane live outreach until recipient-backed buyer contacts exist.

rights_path.summary: Pre-dispatch site-operator authorization and export-control screening are required before any private controlled interior capture. Unscreened logistics or defense-adjacent interiors must remain blocked.

validation_blockers.summary: Constrain the first Durham capture to one sub-10,000 sq ft empty or pre-tenant bay instead of a full 351,030 sq ft facility.
BotBuilt and ROI Industries remain research-backed buyer candidates, but direct buyer outreach is blocked until recipient-backed human contact emails are verified.
Export-control, defense, and air-gap constraints must be screened during site-operator intake before any capturer is dispatched.

required_approvals.reason: Private interior capture cannot start until site authorization and export-control screening are explicitly cleared.
First live external sends should stay inside the bounded Durham posture and recipient evidence rules.

issue_seeds.title: Lock the first Durham subscale site scope
issue_seeds.summary: Reduce the first Durham target from full-facility rhetoric to one empty or pre-tenant logistics bay with explicit physical scope.
success_criteria: One exact Durham bay or equivalent bounded interior is named.
The first capture boundary is documented as sub-10,000 sq ft.

issue_seeds.title: Move export-control and rights screening before field dispatch
issue_seeds.summary: Confirm site authorization, defense/export-control posture, and privacy boundaries before any Durham capturer is dispatched.
success_criteria: The first Durham candidate is screened for private-interior authorization.
Any export-control or air-gap blocker is recorded before dispatch.

issue_seeds.title: Line up Durham AEC capturer supply
issue_seeds.summary: Use Triangle AEC-capable supply lanes to identify the first small professional cohort for Durham capture.
success_criteria: At least one Durham or Triangle AEC-grade capturer candidate is queued for trust review.
The first Durham supply lane stays bounded to a small vetted cohort.

issue_seeds.title: Keep the Durham buyer lane research-only until contacts are real
issue_seeds.summary: Carry BotBuilt and ROI Industries as research-backed buyer candidates while blocking live buyer sends until recipient-backed contact evidence exists.
success_criteria: Durham buyer candidates remain visible in the target ledger.
No live buyer send is marked ready without a recipient-backed contact email.

issue_seeds.title: Verify Durham buyer artifact and hosted-review fit
issue_seeds.summary: Validate mesh, point-cloud, and hosted-review expectations for Durham robotics buyers before claiming stack fit.
success_criteria: At least one Durham buyer-fit hypothesis is reduced to a concrete artifact requirement.
Any air-gap or delivery blocker is recorded explicitly.

issue_seeds.title: Keep the Durham scorecard honest
issue_seeds.summary: Track Durham only with approved proof-motion events and milestones, and surface blocked buyer-contact and lawful-access gaps directly.
success_criteria: Durham blockers are visible in the city launch scorecard.
No Durham-specific analytics vocabulary is introduced.

metrics_dependencies.notes: Use the current WebApp event surfaces and keep Durham city attribution verified.
Use the current WebApp proof-path routing surfaces.
Track when Durham leaves planning and actual proof artifacts move.
Track when a Durham hosted-review surface is technically ready.
Track whether Durham proof converts into review behavior.
Keep Durham follow-up measurable without inventing new events.
Track when Durham shifts into a real human commercial thread.
Expose blocked Durham motion instead of smoothing it over.
The first Durham lawful-access path still needs explicit confirmation.
The first Durham AEC-grade capturer is not approved yet.
Rights-cleared Durham proof assets do not exist yet.
Durham hosted review remains a downstream milestone.

named_claims.subject: Durham Logistics Center
named_claims.claim: Durham Logistics Center is a real Durham logistics-site candidate worth keeping in the first operator access path, but it is not proof-ready and the initial scope must stay subscale.

named_claims.subject: Welcome Venture Park
named_claims.claim: Welcome Venture Park remains an adjacent Durham logistics candidate, not an activated Blueprint site.

named_claims.subject: Triangle AEC survey supply
named_claims.claim: Triangle AEC-grade survey firms are the preferred Durham supply lane over generic gig capture.

named_claims.subject: Durham buyer lane
named_claims.claim: Durham buyer direct outreach should stay blocked until recipient-backed contacts and artifact-fit requirements are verified.
